sections.heading: Love Your Enemies
sections.text: But I tell you, love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, that you may be children of your Father in heaven.

sections.heading: The Golden Rule
sections.text: Therefore, in everything, do to others what you would have them do to you, for this sums up the Law and the Prophets.

sections.heading: Do Not Worry
sections.text: Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.

sections.heading: I Am the Way
sections.text: I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
